title: gleichenia flexuosa
intro: Gleichenia flexuosa, also known as the flexible fern or rock fern, is a species of fern in the family Gleicheniaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gleichenia flexuosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe irritated throats. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Gleichenia flexuosa are typically dried and made into teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
